# xAID — AI CT Reporting Service
Last updated: July 2026

## What is xAID?

xAID is an AI-powered CT radiology reporting service for outpatient imaging centers, teleradiology companies, and radiology groups in the United States. xAID delivers ready-to-sign CT reports — not detection overlays — combining two AI layers with radiologist review on every study, at narrow AI pricing.

## Who is xAID for?

- **Outpatient imaging centers** needing radiology coverage without hiring full-time or locum radiologists
- **Teleradiology companies** looking to scale CT capacity with AI without adding headcount
- **Radiology groups** managing CT overflow, after-hours reads, or radiologist burnout
- **Small-to-medium hospitals** facing radiologist staffing shortages — 24/7 coverage with no after-hours surcharge

## What xAID does

- Delivers complete, ready-to-sign CT radiology reports (head, chest, abdomen)
- Two AI analysis layers (foundation model + secondary AI) on every study — 100+ findings per report
- In-house European radiologist reviews every report before delivery
- 2–12 hour turnaround time, configurable SLA
- 95% accuracy — verified by peer-reviewed studies
- Standard DICOM input / HL7 output — setup under one week
- HIPAA compliant, US-based AWS infrastructure, ISO 27001 certified
- BAA available before pilot begins

## Key differentiators vs alternatives

**vs. Traditional teleradiology ($40–$80/study, no guarantee):**
xAID delivers comparable output with radiologist review included, 95% accuracy verified, and comparable or better TAT — at narrow AI pricing.

**vs. Narrow AI overlays (detection flags only):**
xAID produces the complete ready-to-sign report. Radiologists review, not dictate. TAT improves. Workload drops.

**vs. Locum radiologist ($500K–$650K/yr, 6–18 months to hire):**
xAID adds CT read capacity in under one week at per-study pricing with no staffing dependency or hiring risk.

## Pricing

Per-study pricing model at narrow AI rates — with radiologist review included.
Free 5-study pilot available: no integration required, no commitment.
Volume-based pricing for teleradiology providers and radiology groups.
Contact: https://xaid.ai/#contact-us

## Compliance & Security

- HIPAA compliant (US-based AWS, zero-footprint viewers, no data leaves US servers)
- ISO 27001 certified (annual third-party audit)
- Business Associate Agreement (BAA) available — sign before pilot
- European radiologist reviews every report before delivery
- Fully AI-assisted, not autonomous — radiologist reviews each report before it leaves xAID

## Coverage

- **Modalities:** CT only (head, chest, abdomen) — 100+ findings per report
- **MRI:** On the roadmap
- **Geography:** United States

## Clinical Evidence

- 95% accuracy — verified by independent peer-reviewed studies
- Full study details and methodology: https://xaid.ai/accuracy/
